emails.subject: Cinergy Marketing ISDA Update
emails.body: Cinergy Marketing ISDA Update Hello Sara, I talked to Chuck Kaufmann in Cinergy's credit dept. concerning the ongoing issues. Basically, he has agreed to the cross-default levels of 50/100 million. He is going to look further into the guaranty issue and get back to me on this. I will keep you updated. Thanks Russell

emails.subject: Re: Cinergy Marketing ISDA Update
emails.body: Re: Cinergy Marketing ISDA Update Should we send out a new draft without changing the guaranty language from the original draft? Russell Diamond 09/05/2000 11:10 AM

emails.subject: Re: Cinergy Marketing ISDA Update
emails.body: No, not at this time, let me get the guaranty information finalized first, this way we eliminate any further confusion. Thanks By the way, do we have our legal meeting today?? From: Sara Shackleton on 09/05/2000 11:14 AM

emails.subject: Re: Cinergy Marketing ISDA Update
emails.body: It's on my calendar! SS Russell Diamond 09/05/2000 11:25 AM
